subject: [PATCH v4 18/21] memcg: swap: only charge physical swap slots

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the impact of this change on zswap and zero-filled swap page optimization. Suggested that the patch should only charge physical swap slots when a virtual swap slot is backed by an actual physical swap slot.

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch series refactors the memcg swap charging logic to only charge physical swap slots, deferring charging until a virtual swap slot is backed by an actual physical swap slot.
